Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Void Prism]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Void Prism is the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Void Prism is a name used by one of Horizon's brothers and is also a Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Void Prism is a technique that manifests as a cluster of yellow sparks from a holo-projector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Void Prism's yellow sparks can flicker and disappear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Void Prism's yellow sparks activated the holo-projector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Void Prism appears in a swirl of yellow sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Void Prism is an object capable of solving communication problems in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Void Prism is a character with very sharp sensors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Void Prism is a Zenith Processor that appears as a swirl of yellow light resembling a double helix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Void Prism can shift into a humanoid form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism is a Void Prism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism's form is a snake made of yellow sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism theorizes that the Aether is attempting to protect itself from an upcoming threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Void Prism is a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Void Prism's ship is coming out of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Void Prism uses pathfinding magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Void Prism can counter magic and guide other wizards to do so.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Void Prism is Shyrax's partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Void Prism stated that they will bring pain because the enemy won't settle for peace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Void Prism is a counter-magic taught to Union wizards that is fast and precise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Void Prism can analyze magic and find countermeasures against navigational spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Void Prism communicates with Lutoch Terelle through her mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Void Prism is in the second position of the ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Void Prism shimmered and appeared over the tank containing his host.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Void Prism projects a map of the galaxy into the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism communicates with Lutoch mentally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism is a character who can communicate with Lutoch privately via mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Void Prism is a character who can communicate with Lutoch privately via mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism expressed relief at arriving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Void Prism can take over communication devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Prism is blocking transmissions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Void Prism is represented by a hologram.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Void Prism is a character who spoke urgently to the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Prism projects himself through a wrist console.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
